title: Money and Shipwrights
description: The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Paulie, Iceburg. The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hurry up and beg for forgiveness, Paul!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Why is that pigeon so strong..

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He's practically the hat guy's spokesman

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But how come you can talk!!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Damn it... luchi, you asked for it!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Isn't that going over the edge...?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: His fingers went into the ground

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Please let me know what you know.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: What are his fingers made of...?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Luchi is the one who hit me!!

summary: The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.
